<noinclude>
This is the "Study" template.
It should be called in the following format:  
<pre>
{{Study
|study design=
|PMID=
|DOI=
|URI=
}}
</pre>
Edit the page to see the template text. 
</noinclude><includeonly><div class="d-none" hidden>{{#set:
  |Original page name={{FULLPAGENAME}}
  |Page sort number={{#replace:{{PAGENAME}}|Study}}
  |State={{{State|Incomplete}}}
}}<!--

-->{{#if: {{#pos: {{PAGENAME}}|Study}}||{{#pmid:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}<!--

-->{{DISPLAYTITLE:{{#if:{{#var:title}}|{{#var:title}}|{{{Cite title|}}}}} }}<!--

-->{{#set:Title={{#if:{{#var:title}}|{{#var:title}}|{{{Cite title|}}}}}}}
</div>
<div>
  <div class="float-right font-weight-bold">Study information</div>
  <div class="bg-light btn-group study-btn study-btn-group"><!--

-->{{#formlink:form=Study|link text=Edit|target={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}|reload|returnto={{FULLPAGENAMEE}} }}<!--
-->{{HistoryButton}}<!--
-->{{DeleteButton}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{{State|}}}
     |Complete
     |{{ReviewButton}}<!--
   -->{{#set: Has stale review={{#if:{{#show:Review:{{PAGENAME}}|?Modification date#-F[Ymd]}}
        |{{#ifexpr: 0{{#show:Review:{{PAGENAME}}|?Modification date#-F[Ymd]}} < {{#time:Ymd|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP}}}}
           |true
           |false
         }}
       }}
     }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#formlink:form=Experiment|query string=Experiment[Base page]={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}|link text=Add a new Experiment|reload|returnto={{FULLPAGENAMEE}} }}
  </div>
</div>
<div class="mb-2 p-3 alert alert-info study">
  <div class="float-right">{{#ifeq:{{{State|}}}|Complete|{{:Project:Dropdown}}}}
{{Display state|{{{State|}}}}}</div>
  <div class="d-block d-md-table">
    <div class="d-block d-md-table-row">
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell font-weight-bold text-nowrap">study design {{FieldTooltip|study design}}</div>
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell px-3 text-break">{{#arraymap:{{{study design|}}}|;|@@@|{{#queryformlink: form=Quick filter
         |link text=@@@
         |Quick filter[category]=Studies
         |Quick filter[property]=Study design
         |Quick filter[value]=@@@
         |_run=1
       }}|<br />}}{{#set:study design={{{study design|}}}|+sep=;}}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="d-block d-md-table-row">
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell font-weight-bold h3 py-3">Citation</div>
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell px-3"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="d-block d-md-table-row">
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell font-weight-bold">PMID {{FieldTooltip|PMID}}</div>
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell px-3 text-break">{{#if: {{#pos: {{PAGENAME}}|Study}}|N/A|[[PMID::{{PAGENAME}}]]}}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="d-block d-md-table-row">
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell font-weight-bold">DOI {{FieldTooltip|DOI}}</div>
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell px-3 text-break">{{#if:{{{DOI|{{#var:doi}}}}}|[[DOI::{{{DOI|{{#var:doi}}}}}]]}}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="d-block d-md-table-row">
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell font-weight-bold">URI {{FieldTooltip|URI}}</div>
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell px-3 text-break">{{{URI|}}}{{#set: URI={{{URI|}}}}}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="d-block d-md-table-row">
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell font-weight-bold">Authors {{FieldTooltip|Authors}}</div>
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell px-3 text-break">{{#switch: {{{Mode|}}}
         |Manual={{#arraymap:{{{Cite authors|}}}|,|x|x|,\s}}{{#set:Authors={{{Cite authors|}}}|+sep=,}}{{#set:Authors list={{{Cite authors|}}}}}
         |#default={{#arraymap:{{#var:allAuthorsI}}|,|x|x|,\s}}{{#set:Authors={{#var:allAuthorsI}}|+sep=,}}{{#set:Authors list={{#var:allAuthorsI}}}}
       }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="d-block d-md-table-row">
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell font-weight-bold">Journal {{FieldTooltip|Journal}}</div>
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell px-3 text-break">{{#switch: {{{Mode|}}}
         |Manual= {{{Cite journal|}}}{{#set:Journal={{{Cite journal|}}}}}
         |#default= {{#var:journal}}{{#set:Journal={{#var:journal}}}}
       }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="d-block d-md-table-row">
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell font-weight-bold">Year {{FieldTooltip|Year}}</div>
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell px-3 text-break">{{#switch: {{{Mode|}}}
         |Manual={{{Cite year|}}}{{#set:Year={{{Cite year|}}}}}
         |#default={{#var:year}}{{#set:Year={{#var:year}}}}
       }}</div>
    </div><!--

-->{{#switch: {{{Mode|}}}
         |Manual=
    <div class="d-block d-md-table-row">
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell font-weight-bold">Pages:</div>
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell px-3 text-break">{{{Cite pages|}}}{{#set: Pages={{{Cite pages|}}}}}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="d-block d-md-table-row">
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell font-weight-bold">First page:</div>
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell px-3 text-break">{{{Cite first page|}}}{{#set: First page={{{Cite first page|}}}}}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="d-block d-md-table-row">
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell font-weight-bold">Keywords:</div>
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell px-3 text-break">{{#arraymap:{{{Cite keywords|}}}|;|@|@|,\s}}<!--
         -->{{#set:Keyword={{{Cite keywords|}}}|+sep=;}}<!--
         -->{{#set: Keyword list={{#arraymap:{{{Cite keywords|}}}|;|@|@|,\s}}}}</div>
    </div>
         |#default={{#if: {{#var:keywords}}
            |{{#arraydefine: keys|{{#var:keywords}}|,|unique}}<!-- we pass it to array to unify elements delimiter formatting (a comma with a space after) -->{{#set: Keyword list={{#arrayprint: keys|,&#32;}}}}
    <div class="d-block d-md-table-row">
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell font-weight-bold">Keywords:</div>
      <div class="d-block d-md-table-cell px-3 text-break">{{#arrayprint: keys|,&#32;}}<!--
         -->{{#set:Keyword={{#var:keywords}}|+sep=,}}</div>
    </div>
     }}
   }}
  </div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="experiments-embed">{{#switch: {{{Mode|}}}
         |Manual={{#set:Abstract={{{Cite abstract|}}}}}<!-- -->{{{Cite abstract|}}}
         |#default={{#set:Abstract={{#var:abstract}}}}<!-- -->{{#var:abstract}}
       }}<!--

### SEO

-->{{#seo:
|title={{#if:{{#var:title}}|{{#var:title}}|{{{Cite title|}}}}} - {{SITENAME}}
|description={{cutdesc|{{#switch: {{{Mode|}}}
   |Manual={{{Cite abstract|}}}
   |#default={{#var:abstract}}
 }}|300}}
|keywords={{#if:{{#var:keywords}}|{{#var:keywords}}, }}{{#switch: {{{Mode|}}}
   |Manual={{#arraymap:{{{Cite authors|}}}|,|x|x|,\s}}
   |#default={{#arraymap:{{#var:allAuthorsI}}|,|x|x|,\s}}
 }}
}}
{{#vardefine:inside_embed_loop|yes}}
{{#arraymap:{{#ask:
[[Base page::{{FULLPAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:Experiments]]
|format=array
|link=none
|sort=Page sort number
|order=asc
|sep=;
}}|;|@@@|
=={{SUBPAGENAME:@@@}}==
{{Set page name|@@@}}
{{#ask:[[@@@]][[Modification date::+]]|format=embedded|embedonly=yes}}
|\n}}</div>
{{#vardefine:inside_embed_loop|no}}
{{sliding-toc}}
[[Category:Studies|{{#var:title|{{#explode:{{PAGENAME}}| |-1}}}}]]__NOEDITSECTION__</includeonly>
